verdict: INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_PENDING — interaction term requested but no loadable constructed interaction variable is defined. The generic panel_fe runner would otherwise grade a main-effect coefficient instead of the pre-registered interaction estimand. Add a treatment or decomposition variable with transformation/source/name marking the interaction, or use a bespoke replication script.

falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is considered falsified if the pre-registered empirical test shows the opposite direction of the claim at conventional significance (p > 0.10), or if the primary outcome measure moves less than 10% in the claimed direction across the sample. Exact thresholds will be pinned in the variables and estimator blocks when this stub is promoted from draft.
falsification_test_text: Panel FE of manufacturing-share growth on industrial-policy intensity x governance-capacity (WGI) interaction, country and year FE, 1971-2023; falsified if interaction term not positive at p<0.05 above median capacity.
